<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Internet.bs](https://internetbs.net) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/internetbs/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "internetbs"
  dnsCredentials:
    # INTERNET_BS_API_KEY: API key
    bsAPIKey: ""
    # INTERNET_BS_PASSWORD: API password
    bsPassword: ""
    # INTERNET_BS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    bsPollingInterval: ""
    # INTERNET_BS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    bsPropagationTimeout: ""
    # INTERNET_BS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 3600)
    bsTTL: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
